title: Transaction-Wrapped Write Paths Implementation Plan
summary: Implementation plan to wrap all multi-query Memgraph write paths in RunInTransaction for atomic rollback.
notes: Task-by-task implementation plan/checklist, not a requirements or architecture-decision doc itself; it references a companion SPEC and a to-be-created ADR-004. Classified as DOC (context/plan) rather than SPEC since it describes execution steps, not a technical contract.
